title: Highlights of Virgin Galactic's (SPCE) Q3 2023 Earnings
text: Virgin Galactic reported Q3 2023 earnings with revenue of $1.73 million, more than double the revenue from the prior-year quarter. The company incurred a net loss of $104.6 million or $0.28 per share in the third quarter, compared to a loss of $145.6 million or $0.55 per share in the corresponding period of last year. Research and development expenses decreased 54% to $44.8 million. With a third quarter cash and marketable securities position of approximately $1.1 billion, the company forecasted having sufficient capital to bring their first two Delta ships into service and achieve positive cash flow in 2026. The results demonstrated improving operational metrics despite continued losses, with the company on track for its commercial spaceflight expansion plans.
